name: HERD MENTALITY
revisionLabel: Resize Shepherd's Toolkit button on landing page
description:
Step into the shoes of a cunning shepherd and master the market of the flock in HERD MENTALITY. 

Herd your sheep to the left or right side, but watch out — each call costs wool and the flock doesn’t always follow orders. 

With every move, the sheep shift the value of your calls, just like a real trading floor.

Timing and strategy are key: the right final call can win the round, even if your early bets went sideways.

Plan your moves, read the flock’s behavior, and use special tools to influence the herd.

Track your wool spent, monitor your unrealized gains, and see how your decisions play out in real time. 

With every level comes exciting new challenges and curveballs you wouldn’t expect.

Key Features:

Market-based sheep herding where calls fluctuate with the flock’s movement

Dynamic wool economy that rewards careful planning and smart decisions

Challenging levels with wind, wolves, and other surprises

Tools and upgrades like mowers, grass, and sheepdogs to sway the herd

Level progression that depends on your final call and strategy

Do you have what it takes to control the flock and maximize your wool? Step into the field and find out in HERD MENTALITY.
